info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' dAti dAyati dAp dEpoH dayate rakzaRe qitaH ' (Slo. 4) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'SaNkanIye deSe pUrvApadAne ca gfhItamanuyuYjIta' (kO0 a0 23636) apadAnamapacAro durvfttam avadAnaM tu sotkarzaM caritaM Bavati nirvyUQam ityapAvayorBedaH
'yezAM trIRyavadAtAni vidyA yoniSca karma ca' (pA0 4148 sUtre BAzye) avadAtAni=SudDAni
'yaTEva kzetranirdAtA nirdAtaM kzetrameva ca' (BA0 SA0 976) nirdAtA=tfRAdyapanayena SoDakaH
'yaTodDarati nirdAtA kakzaM DAnyaM ca rakzati' (manu0 7110) ukto'rTaH
'DanurAdAyamAnastu jAnuByAmagamanmahIm' (BA0 Adi0 1825) AdAyamAnaH=AdAyan=parIkzamARaH SunDanniti tu SabdArTaH
